A similar setup would have cost me way more If I wanted insurance (which they didn’t cover) I would have had to pay the entire shipping cost myself)
The screen quality is better than my last ACER I keep trying to copy, paste, and save on reflex while working on paperwork and it basically jumpscares me with a pop-up screen

I got an error message related to the GPU when I checked the Nvidia app it said there was no driver installed, it took two attempts for the driver to download when I rebooted the computer it would only light up the keyboard no sounds no fans no start up There was an electronic burning smell, and then the fan wouldn’t shut off and the computer overheated
